texto: ... I believe strongly in condoms. They avert babies and disease. They make you seem responsible, not slutty. They make the girl relax too, because you’re taking care of the risky part. Like you’re a professional. Roll it on, squeeze the tip, turn back to her, ready, set go. Like I’d just done a little disappearing act on myself and became something confident and wonderful. You can’t see through my latex disguise! You will love this so let’s get down! You don’t want to know how many times this worked in my favor.God I feel like a fucking asshole sometimes. All the time, really.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Carrie Mesrobian: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “... I believe strongly in condoms. They avert babies and disease. They make you seem responsible,…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, condoms, evan pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de trabalho e evan.
